title: Peru-prep 2021
html:
Peru-prep 2021

The summer-2021 Peru / Machu Picchu trip Yahir co-planned with DMorr in the months between high-school graduation and OSU freshman fall. The booking arc surfaces across multiple July/August Apple Notes:

  • 2021 07 28 vegetarian drive todos — "talk to DMorr about Peru ✅, buy Peru tickets ✅" (locked in by Jul 28)
  • 2021 08 03 kira ford mentor intro — "reserve Machu Picchu tickets" still open
  • Probably Yahir's first international trip with a peer rather than family — and the first scrappy travel genuine-attempt in the corpus

The trip also functions as the proof-of-concept for the DMorr travel-partnership that recurs in later notes. Pre-dates the Austin / Brazil / China travel arcs by years.

Connections
